title: Week 5 Review
html:
Congratulations on completing week five! After finishing your lessons you should now know:

  • 9 new kanji
  • 12 new words in katakana
  • How to offer to do something, to talk about an action that happens before another action, discuss events and actions happening in one location and how to discuss hobbies and abilities
  • The dictionary form of verbs, using interrogatives with でも, and conjugate verbs in the て-form
  • Counting books, distance, and long objects
  • How to use 5 new grammar points:
    • Grammar focus on the particles や. など
    • Grammar focus on the adverb このまえ
    • Grammar focus on the particles とか, に
    • Grammar focus on the adverb ぜひ
    • Grammar focus on the particles だけ
If you have any questions on what you have learned this week, don’t forget that you can always ask for more help in the student community!
